news.headline: Chris Richards talks USMNT's World Cup goals
news.description: Chris Richards tells Jeremy Schapp what the USMNT is hoping to accomplish in the World Cup.

news.headline: Socceroos World Cup Daily: Bos games, Touré doesn't train
news.description: Join Joey Lynch and Alex Hatzikostas each day as they go behind the scenes in the Socceroos camp and give the inside word on all the action at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

news.headline: Mohamed Touré, Nestory Irankunda and the thing that unites the Socceroos
news.description: Mohamed Touré and Nestory Irankunda form a key cog in the Socceroos' 2026 World Cup squad, bound by a mateship that has propelled each other to the brink of stardom.

news.headline: Socceroos concern as striker Mohamed Touré misses training
news.description: Socceroos officials have insisted that Mohamed Touré will resume training on Thursday, but provided no specifics on the cause of the absence that sent a scare through camp just days out from the side's opening World Cup fixture against Türkiye.

news.headline: Spain, France lead World Cup odds as U.S. bettors back home team
news.description: France and Spain are the betting favorites to win the 2026 World Cup, while heavy backing for Team USA is creating massive liabilities for sportsbooks.

news.headline: FIFA World Cup 2026: How to watch the Socceroos, fixtures, results, all you need to know
news.description: The biggest FIFA World Cup gets underway shortly and we've got all the answers to your questions about the tournament. When and where is the final being held? How can I watch the Socceroos' games? Who has made the Australia squad?
